welcome.title: Welcome to your MEDA app
welcome.subtitle: Built with the MEDA frontend standards: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, and the MEDA UI library. Start by exploring the components, then build your features.

home.title: Welcome to your MEDA app
home.subtitle: Built with the MEDA frontend standards: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind and the MEDA UI library. Start by exploring the components, then build your features.
home.developShort: Build features with your AI agent.
home.developDetail: Ask your agent to use meda-fe-component (MEDA-standard components) and meda-fe-endpoint (types + client + TanStack hook from OpenAPI). The skills guide the agent.
home.mockDetail: MSW is set up in src/mocks/. Define handlers that simulate the real API to develop without waiting for the backend.
home.standardsDetail: Skills enforce SRP, security, the four UI states, accessibility and the Binance-style MEDA design. The agent follows them automatically.
